changelog: Performance: bundled 41 streaming logos / decade backdrops / theme backdrops / genre backdrops directly into the APK. Hits to the streaming services, decades, themes, and select genre rows now paint from local APK assets in ~5 ms instead of ~500-800 ms via TMDB CDN. Adds ~3 MB to the APK (now 21 MB).

Coil mapper installed in HushTVApp.newImageLoader resolves every URL through BundleOverrides → BundledAssets → fall-through. Pass-through URLs (movie posters, series posters, channel logos) work exactly as before.

Hybrid override system: a hot-patchable bundle_overrides.json on the deploy server lets us replace any bundled or non-bundled URL on the fly without an APK update — same-day fix path for wrong logos, rebrands, etc. Refreshed once every 6 h, cached on disk for instant first-frame on boot.
